name: Baahubali: Before the Beginning
overview: From before Amarendra Baahubali's reign as king, comes a tale of power, politics and intrigue of Queen Sivagami's rise from a vengeful girl to a wise and unequalled queen. Witness the legacy of Mahishmati as it grows into a mighty empire no one dares to oppose.

trailers.title: Baahubali: Before the Beginning | Announcement [HD] | Netflix
